title: Additional Small Stairs
description: The mod adds vanilla small stairs. Small Stairs's Addon
body:
The mod adds vanilla small stairs. [Small Stairs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-stairs119)'s Addon

Required mods: [Small Stairs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-stairs119), [MCPitanLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mcpitanlibarch), [Architectury API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api)  
(When using on Fabric Loader, [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) is also required)

 

Add a 1/3 size stairs. It doesn't take up much space, so you can move it smoothly if you place it after branch mining.

Works with both Fabric and Forge.

 

Small Stairs of the same material as the stairs added in the latest version of vanilla will be added.

For example: Small Cut Copper Stairs, Small Cherry Planks Stairs and Small Smooth Sandstone Stairs

(Some items may not be added depending on the game version.)
